name: Christmas Bears Snack Mix
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Bear-shaped chocolate graham crackers, snacks
2 cups Mini Oreos with red frosting
2 cups Red, white & green candy-coated chocolates
1 cup Red and green gummi bears
recipeInstructions:
1. Place all ingredients in a large bowl.
2. Mix well to combine.
3. Store the mixture in a plastic bag or covered container.
NOTE: Feel free to customize this recipe by using different chocolate graham snacks or mini Oreos with your choice of small cookies or treats desired.
